Records.authors: Klappert, Jonas, Lange, Fabian, Maierhöfer, Philipp, Usovitsch, Johann
Records.description: Non-planar two-loop double-box topology arising in virtual NNLO corrections to single top production. Seven genuine propagators ($P_1$-$P_7$) plus two auxiliary ISPs ($P_8$, $P_9$). Two internal lines carry mass $m_1$ (top quark) and one line carries mass $m_2$ (W boson). External legs: $p_1$, $p_2$ massless, $q_2$ massless, $q_1$ on-shell with $q_1^2=m_1^2$. IBP reduction performed with Kira 2.0 + FireFly with $r=7$, $s=4$ (about 1.6 million probes over four prime fields). No analytic master integral evaluation; this is a benchmark of the reduction step only. Example shipped in examples/topo5.
